Tarapara yakhana tara kata haye pare yaya [5] takhana tomara ta theke kha'o ebam ahara kara'o dhairyasila abhabagrasthake o sahayyaprarthiderake [6]; ebhabe amara seguloke tomadera basibhuta kare diyechi yate tomara krtajnata prakasa kara
22_37: Allah‌ra kache paumchaya na segulora gosata ebam rakta, baram tamra kache paumchaya tomadera taka'oya [1]. Ebhabe'i tini ederake tomadera basibhuta kare diyechena yate tomara allah‌ra sresthatba ghosana kara ejan'ya ye, tini tomaderake hedayeta karechena; kaje'i apani susambada dina satkarmaparayanaderake
22_38: Niscaya allah‌ muminadera paksa theke pratirodha karena [1], tini kono bisbasaghataka, akrtajnake pachanda karena na
22_39: Yud'dhera anumati deya hala taderake yara akranta hayeche [1]; karana tadera prati atyacara kara hayeche [2]. Ara niscaya allah‌ taderake sahayya karate samyaka saksama
22_40: Taderake tadera ghara-bari theke an'yayabhabe bahiskara kara hayeche sudhu e karane ye, tara bale ‘amadera raba allah‌.’ Allah‌ yadi manusadera eka dalake an'ya dala dbara pratihata na karatena [1], tahale bidhbasta haye yeta nasara sansarabiragidera upasanasthana, girja, iyahudidera upasanalaya [2] ebam masajidasamuha---yate khuba besi smarana kara haya allah‌ra nama. Ara niscaya allah‌ take sahayya karena ye allah‌ke sahayya kare [3]. Niscaya allah‌ saktimana, parakramasali
22_41: Tara [1] emana loka yaderake amara yaminera buke pratisthita karale salata kayema karabe [2], yakata debe ebam satkajera nirdesa debe o asatkaje nisedha karabe; ara saba kajera curanta parinati allah‌ra ikhatiyare
22_42: Ara yadi lokera apanara prati mithyaropa kare, tabe tadera age nuha, ‘ada o samudera sampradaya'o to mithyaropa karechila
22_44: ara mada'iyanabasira; anurupabhabe mithyaropa kara hayechila musara prati'o. Atahpara ami kapheraderake abakasa diyechilama, tarapara ami taderake pakara'o karechilama. Ata'eba (pratyaksa karuna) amara pratyakhyana (sasti) kemana chila
22_45: atahpara amara bahu janapada dhbansa karechi yegulora basinda chila yalema. Phale esaba janapada tadera gharera chadasaha dhbansastupe parinata hayeche. Anurupabhabe bahu kupa parityakta hayeche ebam aneka sudrrha prasada'o
22_46: tara ki yamine bhramana kareni? Tahale tara jnanabud'dhisampanna hrdaya o srutisaktisampanna srabanera adhikari hate parata [1]. Bastuta cokha to andha naya, baram andha hacche bukera madhye abasthita hrdaya
22_47: Ara tara apanake sasti tbaranbita karate bale, athaca allah‌ tamra pratisruti kakhano bhanga karena na [1]. Ara niscaya apanara rabera kache ekadina tomadera gananara hajara bacharera samana
22_48: Ara ami abakasa diyechi bahu janapadake yakhana tara chila yalema; tarapara ami taderake pakara'o karechi, ara amara'i kache pratyabartanasthala
22_49: Baluna, ‘he manusa! Ami to kebala tomadera jan'ya eka suspasta satarkakari
22_50: kaje'i yara imana ane o satkaja kare tadera jan'ya ache ksama o sam'manajanaka jibika
22_51: ebam yara amadera ayatasamuhake byartha karara cesta kare, tara'i habe jahannamera adhibasi
22_52: Ara amara apanara purbe ye rasula kimba nabi prerana karechi [1], tadera ke'u yakhana'i (ohira kichu) tila'oyata kareche [2], takhana'i sayatana tadera tila'oyate (kichu) niksepa kareche, kintu sayatana ya niksepa kare allah‌ ta bidurita karena [3]. Tarapara allah‌ tamra ayatasamuhake supratisthita karena ebam allah‌ sarbajna, prajnamaya
22_53: Eta e jan'ya ye, sayatana ya praksipta kare tini setake pariksasbarupa karena tadera jan'ya yadera antare byadhi rayeche ara yara pasanahrdaya [1]. Ara niscaya yalemara dustara birodhitaya lipta rayeche
22_54: Ara e jan'ye'o ye, yaderake jnana deya hayeche tara yena janate pare ye, eta apanara rabera kacha theke pathano satya; phale tara tara upara imana ane o tadera antara tara prati binayabanata haya. Ara yara imana eneche, allah‌ niscaya taderake sarala patha pradarsanakari
22_55: Ara yara kuphari kareche, tara tate sandeha posana theke birata habe na, yataksana na tadera kache keyamata ese parabe hathat kare athaba ese parabe eka bandhya dinera sasti
22_56: Sedina allah‌ra'i adhipatya; tini'i tadera majhe bicara karabena. Atahpara yara imana eneche o satkaja kareche, tara neyamata paripurna jannate abasthana karabe
22_57: Ara yara kuphari kareche o amadera ayatasamuhe mithyaropa karache, tadera'i jan'ya rayache lanchanadayaka sasti
22_58: Ara yara hijarata kareche allah‌ra pathe, tarapara nihata hayeche athaba mara geche, taderake allah‌ abasya'i utkrsta jibika dana karabena; ara niscaya allah‌, tini to sarbotkrsta riyikadata
22_59: Tini taderake abasya'i emana sthane prabesa karabena, ya tara pachanda karabe, ara allah‌ to samyaka jnani [1], parama sahanasila
22_60: Eta'i haye thake, ara kono byakti nipirita haye nipirana parimana pratisodha grahana karale [1] tarapara punaraya se nipirita hale allah‌ take abasya'i sahayya karabena [2]; niscaya allah‌ papa mocanakari, ksamasila
22_61: Eta e jan'ye ye, niscaya allah‌ ratake prabesa karana dinera madhye ebam dinake prabesa karana ratera madhye [1]. Ara niscaya allah‌ sarbasrota, sarbadrasta
22_62: ejan'ye ye, niscaya allah‌, tini'i satya ebam tara tamra paribarte yake dake ta to asatya [1]. Ara niscaya allah‌, tini'i samucca, sumahana
22_63: Apani ki dekhena na ye, allah‌ pani barsana karena akasa hate; yate sabuja syamala haye uthe yamina [1]? Niscaya allah‌ suksmadarsi, samyaka abahita
22_64: Asamanasamuha o yamine ya kichu ache ta tamra'i. Ara niscaya allah‌, tini'i to abhabamukta, parama prasansita
22_65: Apani ki dekhate pana na ye, allah‌ tomadera kalyane niyojita karechena [1] prthibite ya kichu ache sesabake ebam tamra nirdese sagare bicaranasila nauyanasamuhake? Ara tini'i asamanake [2] dhare rakhena yate ta pare na yaya yaminera upara tamra anumati chara. Niscaya allah‌ manusera prati snehaprabana, parama dayalu
22_66: Ara tini'i tomaderake jibita karechena; tarapara tini'i tomadera mrtyu ghatabena, punaraya tini'i tomaderake jibita karabena. Manusa to khuba besi akrtajna
22_67: Amara pratyeka um'matera jan'ya nirdharita kare diyechi ‘manasaka’ [1] (ibadata pad'dhati) ya tara palana kare. Kaje'i tara yena e byapare apanara sathe bitarka na kare. Ara apani apanara rabera dike dakuna, apani to sarala pathe'i pratisthita
22_68: Ara tara yadi apanara sathe bitanda kare tabe bale dina, ‘tomara ya kara se sambandhe allah‌ samyaka abagata’
22_69: ‘Tomara ye bisaye matabheda karacha allah‌ keyamatera dina se bisaya tomadera madhye bicara-mimansa kare debena [1].’
22_70: Apani ki janena na ye, asamana o yamine ya kichu ache allah‌ ta janena. Esaba'i to ache eka kitabe [1]; niscaya ta allah‌ra nikata ati sahaja
22_71: Ara tara ‘ibadata kare allah‌ra paribarte emana kichura yara samparke tini kono dalila nayila karenani ebam yara sambandhe tadera kono jnana ne'i [1]. Ara yalemadera kono sahayyakari ne'i
22_72: Ara tadera kache amadera suspasta ayatasamuha tila'oyata kara hale apani kapheradera mukhamandale asantosa dekhate pabena. Yara tadera kache amadera ayata tila'oyata kare taderake tara akramana karate udyata haya. Baluna, ‘tabe ki ami tomaderake era ceye'o manda kichura sambada deba? --- Eta aguna [1]. Yara kuphari kare allah‌ taderake era pratisruti diyechena. Ara eta kata nikrsta phire ya'oyara sthana!’
22_73: He manusa! Ekati upama deya hacche, manoyogera sathe ta sona: Tomara allah‌ra paribarte yaderake daka tara to kakhano ekati machi'o srsti karate parabe na, e uddesye tara saba'i ekatra hale'o [1] ebam machi yadi kichu chiniye niye yaya tadera kacha theke, eta'o tara tara kacha theke ud'dhara karate parabe na. Anbesanakari o anbesanakrta kata'i na durbala
22_74: tara allahake yathayogya maryada deyani yemana maryada deya ucita chila [1], niscaya allah‌ ksamatabana, parakramasali
22_75: Allah‌ phirisatadera madhya theke manonita karena rasula ebam manusera madhya theke'o [1]; niscaya allah‌ sarbasrota, samyaka drasta
22_76: Tadera samane o pichane ya kichu ache tini ta janena ebam saba bisaya'i allah‌ra kache pratyabartita kara habe
22_77: He muminagana! Tomara ruku‘kara, sajada kara ebam tomadera rabera ‘ibadata kara o satkaja kara, yate tomara saphalakama hate para
22_78: Ara jihada kara allah‌ra pathe yebhabe jihada kara ucita [1]. Tini tomaderake manonita karechena [2]. Tini dinera byapare tomadera upara kono sankirnata rakhenani [3]. Tomadera pita [4] ibarahimera millata [5]. Tini age tomadera namakarana karechena ‘musalima’ ebam e kitabe'o [6]; yate rasula tomadera jan'ya saksisbarupa hana ebam tomara saksisbarupa ha'o manusera jan'ya [7]. Kaje'i tomara salata kayema kara, yakata da'o [8] ebam allahake majabutabhabe abalambana kara [9]; tini'i tomadera abhibhabaka, tini kata'i na uttama abhibhabaka ara kata'i na uttama sahayyakari
23_3: ara yara asara karmakanda theke thake bimukha
23_5: ara yara nijedera yaunangake rakhe sanraksita
23_6: nijedera stri ba adhikarabhukta dasigana chara, ete tara habe na nindita
23_7: atahpara ke'u ederake chara an'yake kamana karale, tara'i habe simalanghanakari
23_8: ara yara raksa kare nijedera amanata [1] o pratisruti
23_9: ara yara nijedera salate thake yatnabana
23_11: yara adhikari habe phirada'usera [1], yate tara habe sthayi
23_12: Ara abasya'i amara manusake srsti karechi matira upadana theke
23_13: tarapara amara take sukrabindurupe sthapana kari eka nirapada bhandare
23_14: Pare amara sukrabinduke parinata kari ‘alaka-te, atahpara ‘alaka-ke parinata kari gosatapinde, atahpara gosatapindake parinata kari asthite; atahpara asthike dheke de'i gosata diye; tarapara take gare tuli an'ya eka srstirupe [1]. Ata'eba, (dekhe nina) sarbottama srasta [2] allah‌ kata barakatamaya
23_16: tarapara keyamatera dina niscaya tomaderake ut'thita kara habe
23_17: Ara abasya'i amara tomadera urdhbe srsti karechi satati asamana [1] ebam amara srsti bisaye mote'i udasina na'i
23_18: ara amara akasa theke pani barsana kari parimitabhabe [1]; atahpara amara ta matite sanraksita kari; ara abasya'i amara ta niye yete'o sampurna saksama
23_19: Tarapara amara ta diye tomadera jan'ya khejura o angurera bagana srsti kari; ete tomadera jan'ya ache pracura phala; ara ta theke tomara kheye thaka
23_20: ara srsti kari eka gacha ya janmaya sina'i parbate, ete utpanna haya taila ebam yara khaya tadera jan'ya khabara tatha tarakari
23_21: Ara tomadera jan'ya abasya'i siksaniya bisaya ache catuspada jantuguloya; tomaderake amara pana kara'i tadera pete ya ache ta theke ebam tate tomadera jan'ya rayeche pracura upakarita; ara tomara ta theke kha'o
23_22: ara tate o nauyane tomadera bahana'o kara haye thake
23_23: Ara abasya'i amara nuhake pathiyechilama tara sampradayera kache [1]. Tini balalena, ‘he amara sampradaya! Tomara allah‌ra ‘ibadata kara, tini chara tomadera an'ya kono satya ilaha ne'i, tabu'o ki tomara taka'oya abalambana karabe na [2]?’
23_24: Atahpara tara sampradayera netara, yara kuphari karechila [1], tara balala, ‘e to tomadera mata ekajana manusa'i, se tomadera upara sresthatba labha karate cacche, ara allah‌ icche karale pheresata'i nayila karatena; amara to amadera purbapurusadera kale erupa ghateche bale sunini
23_25: ‘E to emana loka yake unmadana peye baseche; kaje'i tomara era samparke kichukala apeksa kara.’
23_26: Nuha balechilena, ‘he amara raba! Amake sahayya karuna, karana tara amara prati mithyaropa kareche [1].’
23_27: Tarapara amara tara kache ohi pathalama, ‘apani amadera caksusa tattbabadhana o amadera ohi anuyayi nauyana nirmana karuna, tarapara yakhana amadera adesa asabe ebam ununa [1] uthale uthabe, takhana uthiye nebena pratyeka jibera eka eka jora ebam apanara paribara-parijanake, taderake chara yadera birud'dhe age sid'dhanta hayeche. Ara tadera samparke apani amake kichu balabena na yara yuluma kareche. Tara to nimajjita habe
23_28: Atahpara yakhana apani o apanara sangira nauyanera upare sthira habena takhana baluna, ‘samasta prasansa allah‌ra'i, yini amaderake ud'dhara karechena yalema sampradaya theke.’
23_29: Aro baluna, ‘he amara raba! Amake namiye dina kalyanakarabhabe; ara apani'i srestha abataranakari.’
23_30: Ete abasya'i rayeche bahu nidarsana [1]. Ara amara to taderake pariksa karechilama
23_31: Tarapara amara tadera pare an'ya eka prajanma [1] srsti karechilama
23_32: erapara amara tadera'i ekajanake tadera kache rasula kare pathiyechilama! Tini balechilena, ‘tomara allah‌ra ‘ibadata kara, tini chara tomadera an'ya kono satya ilaha ne'i [1], tabu'o ki tomara taka'oya abalambana karabe na?’
23_33: Ara tara sampradayera netara, yara kuphari karechila o akheratera saksate mithyaropa karechila ebam yaderake amara diyechilama duniyara jibanera pracura bhoga-sambhara [1], tara balechila, ‘e to tomadera'i mata ekajana manusa; tomara ya kha'o, se ta-i khaya ebam tomara ya pana kara se'o ta'i pana kare
23_34: ‘yadi tomara tomadera'i mata ekajana manusera anugatya kara tabe tomara abasya'i ksatigrastha habe
23_35: ‘Se ki tomaderake e pratisruti'i deya ye, tomadera mrtyu hale ebam tomara mati o asthite parinata hale'o tomaderake bera kara habe
23_36: ‘asambhaba, tomaderake ye bisaya pratisruti deya hayeche ta asambhaba
23_37: ‘Ekamatra duniyara jibana'i amadera jibana, amara mari bamci ekhane'i. Ara amara punarut'thita ha'oyara na'i
23_38: ‘Se to emana byakti ye allah‌ sambandhe mithya apabada dicche, amara to take bisbasa karara na'i.’
23_39: Tini balalena, ‘he amara raba! Amake sahayya karuna; karana tara amara prati mithyaropa kareche.’
23_41: Tarapara eka birata a'oyaja satya-n'yayera sathe [1] taderake pakara'o karala, phale amara taderake taranga-tarita abarjanara mata [2] kare dilama. Kaje'i yalema sampradayera jan'ya ra'ila dhbansa
23_42: Tarapara tadera pare amara bahu prajanma srsti karechi
23_43: Kono jati'i tara nirdharita kalake tbaranbita karate pare na, bilambita'o karate pare na
23_44: Erapara amara ekera para eka amadera rasulaganake prerana karechi. Yakhana'i kono jatira kache tara rasula esechena takhana'i tara tara prati mithyaropa kareche. Atahpara amara tadera ekera para ekake dhbansa kare taderake kahinira bisaya kare diyechi. Kaje'i yara imana ane na se samasta sampradayera jan'ya dhbansa'i ra'ila
23_45: tarapara amara amadera nidarsanasamuha ebam suspasta pramanasaha musa o tara bha'i harunake pathalama
23_46: phira‘a'una o tara parisadabargera kache. Kintu tara ahankara karala; ara tara chila ud'dhata sampradaya
23_47: Atahpara tara balala, ‘amara ki emana du’byaktite bisbasa sthapana karaba yara amadera'i mata, athaca tadera sampradaya amadera dasatbakari [1]?’
23_48: Sutaram tara tadera ubhayera prati mithyaropa karala, phale tara dhbansapraptadera antarbhukta hala
23_49: Ara amara to musake diyechilama kitaba; yate tara hedayeta paya
23_50: Ara amara mara'iyama-putra o tara jananike karechilama eka nidarsana ebam taderake asraya diyechilama eka abasthanayogya o prasrabanabisista ucca bhumite
23_51: ‘He rasulagana [1]! Apanara pabitra bastu theke khadya grahana karuna ebam satkaja karuna [2]; niscaya apanara ya karena se samparke ami sabisesa abagata
23_52: Ara apanadera e um'mata to eka'i um'mata [1] ebam ami'i apanadera raba; ata'eba amara'i taka'oya abalambana karuna [2].’
23_53: Atahpara lokera tadera nijedera madhye tadera e bisaya tatha dinake bahudha bibhakta kareche [1]. Pratyeka dala'i tadera kache ya ache ta niye anandita
23_54: Kaje'i kichu kalera jan'ya taderake sbiya bibhrantite chere dina
23_55: Tara ki mane kare ye, amara taderake ye dhana-sampada o santana-santati dbara sahayogita karechi, tara madhyame
23_56: tadera jan'ya sakala mangala tbaranbita karachi? Na, tara upalad'dhi kare na
23_57: Niscaya yara tadera rabera bhaye santrasta
23_58: ara yara tadera rabera nidarsanabalite imana ane
23_59: ara yara tadera rabera sathe sirka kare na
23_60: ara yara ya deyara ta deya [1] bhita-kampita hrdaye, ejan'ya ye tara tadera rabera kache pratyabartanakari
23_61: Tara'i druta sampadana kare kalyanakara kaja ebam tara tate agragami haya
23_62: Ara amara ka'uke'o tara sadhyera besi dayitba de'i na. Ara amadera kache ache emana eka kitaba [1] ya satya byakta kare ebam tadera prati yuluma kara habe na
23_63: Baram e bisaya tadera antara ajnanataya acchanna, echara'o tadera aro kaja ache ya tara karache
23_64: Sesa paryanta yakhana amara tadera bilasi [1] byaktiderake sasti dbara pakara'o kari takhana'i tara artanada kare uthe
23_65: Taderake bala habe, ‘aja artanada karo na, tomaderake to amadera paksa theke sahayya kara habe na.’
23_66: Amara ayata to tomadera kache tila'oyata kara hata [1], kintu tomara ulto paye pichane sare parate
23_67: Dambhabhare e bisaye arthahina galpa-gujabe [1] rata matiye [2] tomara kharapa katha balate
23_68: Tabe ki tara e banite cinta-gabesana kareni [1]? Naki e jan'ye ye, tadera kache emana kichu eseche ya tadera purbapurusadera kache aseni
23_69: naki tara tadera rasulake cine na bale take asbikara karache
23_70: naki tara bale ye, tini unmadanagrasta? [1] Na, tini tadera kache satya enechena, ara tadera adhikansa'i satyake apachandakari
23_71: Ara hakka yadi tadera kamana-basanara anugami hata tabe bisrnkhala haye parata asamanasamuha o yamina ebam egulote ya kichu ache sabakichu'i [1]. Baram amara tadera kache niye esechi tadera ijjata o sam'mana sambalita yikara [2] kintu tara tadera e yikara (kura'ana) theke mukha phiriye neya
23_72: Naki apani tadera ache kono pratidana cana? [1] Apanara rabera pratidana'i to srestha ebam tini'i srestha riyikadata
23_73: Ara apani to taderake sarala pathera dike'i ahbana karachena
23_74: Ara niscaya yara akherate imana rakhe na, tara sarala patha theke bicyuta
23_75: ara yadi amara taderake daya kari ebam tadera duhkha-dain'ya dura kari tabu'o tara abadhyataya bibhrantera n'yaya ghurate thakabe
23_76: Ara abasya'i amara taderake sasti dbara pakara'o karalama, tarapara'o tara tadera rabera prati binata hala na ebam katara prarthana'o karala na
23_77: Abasese yakhana amara tadera upara kathina kono sastira duyara khule deba takhana'i tara ete asahata haye parabe
23_78: Ara tini'i tomadera jan'ya kana, cokha o antakarana srsti karechena; tomara khuba alpa'i krtajnata prakasa kare thaka
23_79: Ara tini'i tomaderake yamine bistrta karechena [1] ebam tomaderake tamra'i kache ekatra kara habe
23_80: Ara tini'i jibita karena ebam mrtyu dena ara tamra'i adhikare rata o dinera paribartana [1]. Tabu'o ki tomara bujhabe na
23_81: baram tara bale, yemana balechila purbabartira
23_82: Tara bale, ‘amadera mrtyu ghatale ebam amara mati o asthite parinata hale'o ki amara punarut'thita haba
23_83: amaderake to e bisaye'i pratisruti pradana kara hayeche ebam atite amadera purbapurusaderake'o. Eta to purbabartidera upakatha chara ara kichu'i naya.’
23_84: Baluna, ‘yamine ebam ete ya kichu ache egulo(ra malikana) kara? Yadi tomara jana (tabe bala).’
23_85: Abasya'i tara balabe, ‘allah‌ra.’ Baluna, ‘tabu'o ki tomara siksa grahana karabe na?’
23_86: Baluna, ‘sata asamana o maha-‘arasera raba ke?’
23_87: Abasya'i tara balabe, ‘allah‌.’ Baluna, ‘tabu'o ki tomara taka'oya abalambana karabe na?’
23_88: Baluna, ‘kara hate samasta bastura kartrtba? Yini asraya pradana karena athaca tamra bipakse ke'u ka'uke asraya dite pare na [1], yadi tomara jana (tabe bala).’
23_89: Abasya'i tara balabe, ‘allah‌.’ Baluna, ‘tahale kotha theke tomara jadukrta haccho?’
23_90: Baram amara to tadera kache haka niye esechi; ara niscaya tara mithyabadi
23_91: Allah‌ kono santana grahana karenani ebam tamra sathe an'ya kono ilaha'o ne'i; yadi thakata tabe pratyeka ilaha sbiya srsti niye prthaka haye yeta ebam eke an'yera upara pradhan'ya bistara karata [1]. Tara ye gune take gunanbita kare ta theke allah‌ kata pabitra- mahana
23_92: tini gayeba o upasthitera jnani, sutaram tara ya kichu sarika kare tini tara urdhbe
23_93: Baluna, ‘he amara raba! Ye bisaye taderake pratisruti pradana kara hacche, apani yadi ta amake dekhate cana
23_94: tabe, he amara raba! Apani amake yalema sampradayera antarbhukta karabena na [1].’
23_95: Ara amara taderake ye bisaye pratisruti pradana karachi, amara ta apanake dekhate abasya'i saksama
23_96: Mandera mukabila karuna ya uttama ta dbara; tara (amake) ye gune gunanbita kare amara se sambandhe sabisesa abagata
23_97: Ara baluna, ‘he amara raba! Ami apanara asraya prarthana kari sayatanera prarocana theke [1].’
23_98: ‘Ara he amara raba! Ami apanara asraya prarthana kari amara kache tadera upasthiti theke.’
23_99: Abasese yakhana tadera karo mrtyu ase, se bale, ‘he amara raba! Amake abara pherata pathana
23_100: ‘yate ami satkaja karate pari ya ami age karini [1].’ Na, eta ha'oyara naya. Eta to tara ekati bakya matra ya se balabe'i [2]. Tadera samane bar‌yakha [3] thakabe ut'thana dina paryanta
23_101: Atahpara yedina singaya phumka deya habe [1] sedina parasparera madhye atmiyatara bandhana thakabe na [2] ebam eke an'yera khomja-khabara nebe na
23_102: atahpara yadera palla bhari habe tara'i habe saphalakama
23_103: ara yadera palla halaka habe, tara'i nijedera ksati kareche; tara jahanname sthayi habe
23_104: Aguna tadera mukhamandala dagdha karabe ebam tara sekhane thakabe bibhatsa ceharaya
23_105: tomadera kache ki amara ayatasamuha tila'oyata kara hata na? Tarapara tomara sesabe mithyaropa karate
23_106: Tara balabe, ‘he amadera raba! Durbhagya amaderake peye basechila ebam amara chilama eka pathabhrasta sampradaya
23_107: ‘he amadera raba! E aguna theke amaderake bera karuna; tarapara amara yadi punaraya kuphari kari, tabe to amara abasya'i yalima haba.’
23_108: Allah‌ balabena, ‘tomara hina abasthaya ekhane'i thaka ebam amara sathe kono katha balabe na
23_109: Amara bandaganera madhye ekadala chila yara balata, ‘he amadera raba! Amara imana enechi ata'eba apani amaderake ksama karuna o daya karuna, ara apani to sarbasrestha dayalu.’
23_110: ‘Kintu taderake niye tomara eto thatta-bidrupa karate ye, ta tomaderake bhuliye diyechila amara smarana. Ara tomara tadera niye hasi-thatta'i karate.’
23_111: ‘Niscaya ami aja taderake tadera dhairyera karane emanabhabe puraskrta karalama ye, tara'i hala saphalakama.’
23_112: Allah‌ balabena, ‘tomara yamine kata bachara abasthana karechile?’
23_113: Tara balabe, ‘amara abasthana karechilama ekadina ba dinera kichu ansa; sutaram apani gananakariderake jijnesa karuna.’
23_114: Tini balabena, ‘tomara alpa kala'i abasthana karechile, yadi tomara janate
23_115: ‘tomara ki mane karechile ye, amara tomaderake anarthaka srsti karechi ebam tomaderake amadera kache phiriye ana habe na?’
23_116: Sutaram allah‌ mahimanbita, prakrta malika, tini chara kono hakka ilaha ne'i; tini sam'manita ‘arasera raba
23_117: Ara ye byakti allah‌ra sathe an'ya ilahake dake, e bisaye tara nikata kono pramana ne'i; tara hisaba to tara rabera nikata'i ache; niscaya kapherara saphalakama habe na
23_118: Ara baluna, ‘he amara raba! Ksama karuna o daya karuna, ara apani'i to sarbasrestha dayalu.’
24_1: Eta ekati sura, eta amara nayila karechi ebam era bidhanake amara abasya palaniya karechi, ara ete amara nayila karechi suspasta ayatasamuha yate tomara upadesa grahana kara
24_2: Byabhicarini o byabhicari-- tadera pratyekake ekasata betraghata karabe [1], allah‌ra bidhana karyakarikarane tadera prati daya yena tomaderake prabhabanbita na kare [2], yadi tomara allah‌ ebam akheratera upara imanadara ha'o; ara muminadera ekati dala yena tadera sasti pratyaksa kare
24_3: Byabhicari purusa-byabhicarinike athaba musarika narike chara biye kare na ebam byabhicarini nari, take byabhicari athaba musarika chara ke'u biye kare na [1], ara muminadera jan'ya eta harama kara hayeche
24_4: Ara yara saccaritra narira [1] prati apabada aropa kare, tarapara tara carajana saksi niye na ase, taderake tomara asiti betraghata kara ebam tomara kakhano tadera saksya grahana karabe na; era'i to phaseka
24_5: Tabe yara erapara ta'oba kare o nijederake sansodhana kare, tahale allah‌ to atisaya ksamasila, parama dayalu
24_6: Ara yara nijedera strira prati apabada aropa kare athaca nijera chara tadera kono saksi ne'i, tadera pratyekera saksya e'i, se allah‌ra name carabara sapatha kare balabe ye, se niscaya satyabadidera antarbhukta
24_7: ebam pancamabare balabe ye, se mithyabadi hale tara upara neme asabe allah‌ra la‘nata
24_8: Ara stri lokatira sasti rahita habe yadi se carabara allah‌ra name sapatha kare saksya deya ye, niscaya tara sbami'i mithyabadi
24_9: ebam pancamabare balabe ye, tara sbami satyabadi hale tara nijera upara neme asabe allah‌ra gayaba
24_10: Tomadera prati allah‌ra anugraha o daya na thakale [1]; ebam allah‌ to ta'oba grahanakari o prajnamaya
24_11: Niscaya yara e apabada [1] racana kareche, tara to tomadera'i ekati dala [2]; etake tomara tomadera jan'ya anistakara mane karo na; baram etato tomadera jan'ya kalyanakara; tadera pratyekera jan'ya ache tadera papakajera phala [3] ebam tadera madhye ye e byapare pradhana bhumika grahana kareche, tara jan'ya ache maha sasti
24_12: Yakhana tara eta sunala takhana mumina purusa ebam mumina narigana tadera nijedera samparke kena bhala dharana karala na ebam (kena) balala na, ‘eta to suspasta apabada [1]?’
24_13: Tara kena e byapare carajana saksi upasthita kareni? Yehetu tara saksi upasthita kareni, sutaram tara'i allah‌ra kache mithyabadi
24_14: Duniya o akherate tomadera prati allah‌ra anugraha o daya na thakale, tomara yate jariye giyechile tara jan'ya mahasasti tomaderake sparsa karata
24_15: Yakhana tomara mukhe mukhe eta characchile [1] ebam emana bisaya mukhe uccarana karachile yara kono jnana tomadera chila na. Ara tomara etake tuccha ganya karechile, athaca allah‌ra kache eta chila gurutara bisaya
24_16: Ara tomara yakhana eta sunale takhana kena balale na, ‘e bisaya balabali kara amadera ucita naya; allah‌ pabitra, mahana. Etato eka gurutara apabada!’
24_17: Allah‌ tomaderake upadesa dicchena, ‘tomara yadi mumina ha'o tabe kakhano yate anurupa acaranera punarabrtti na karo [1].’
24_18: Ara allah‌ tomadera jan'ya ayatasamuhake spastabhabe bibrta karena ebam allah‌ sarbajna, prajnamaya
24_19: Niscaya yara muminadera madhye aslilatara prasara kamana kare, tadera jan'ya rayeche duniya o akherate yantranadayaka sasti. Ara allah‌ janena, tomara jano na
24_20: Ara tomadera prati allah‌ra anugraha o daya na thakale [1]; ara allah‌ to dayardra o parama dayalu
24_21: He muminagana! Tomara sayatanera padanka anusarana karo na. Ara ke'u sayatanera padanka anusarana karale sayatana to aslilata o manda kajera'i nirdesa deya. Allah‌ra anugraha o daya na thakale tomadera ke'u'i kakhano pabitra hate parate na, tabe allah‌ yake icche pabitra karena ebam allah‌ sarbasrota, sarbajna
24_22: Ara tomadera madhye yara aisbarya o pracuryera adhikari tara yena sapatha grahana na kare ye, tara atmiya-sbajana, abhabagrasthake o allah‌ra rastaya hijaratakariderake kichu'i debe na; tara yena taderake ksama kare ebam tadera dosa-truti upeksa kare [1]. Tomara ki ca'o na ye, allah‌ tomaderake ksama karuna [2]? Ara allaha ksamasila, parama dayalu
24_23: Yara saccaritra, saralamana-udasa, imanadara naridera prati apabada aropa kare [1] tara to duniya o akherate abhisapta ebam tadera jan'ya rayeche mahasasti
24_24: Yedina tadera birud'dhe saksya debe tadera jihba, tadera hata o tadera pa tadera krtakarma sambandhe
24_25: sedina allah‌ tadera hakka tatha prapya pratiphala puropuri debena ebam tara jene nebe ye, allah‌i suspasta satya
24_26: Duscaritra nari duscaritra purusadera jan'ya; duscaritra purusa duscaritra narira jan'ya; saccaritra nari saccaritra purusera jan'ya ebam saccaritra purusa saccaritra narira jan'ya. Lokera ya bale tara sathe tara samparkahina; tadera jan'ya ache ksama ebam sam'manajanaka jibika
24_27: He muminagana [1]! Tomara nijedera ghara chara an'ya karo ghare tara adhibasidera sampritisampanna anumati na niye ebam taderake salama na kare [2] prabesa karo na [3]. Eta'i tomadera jan'ya uttama, yate tomara upadesa grahana kara
24_28: Yadi tomara ghare ka'uke'o na pa'o tahale sekhane prabesa karabe na yataksana na tomaderake anumati deya haya [1]. Yadi tomaderake bala haya, ‘phire ya'o’, tabe tomara phire yabe, eta'i tomadera jan'ya adhika pabitra [2]. Ara tomara ya kara se sambandhe allah‌ sabisesa abagata
24_29: Ye ghare ke'u basa kare na [1] tate tomadera kono bhoga kara [2] ba upakrta ha'oyara adhikara thakale sekhane tomadera prabese kono papa ne'i. Ara allah‌ janena ya tomara prakasa kara ebam ya tomara gopana kara
24_30: Muminaderake baluna, tara yena tadera drstike sanyata kare ebam tadera lajjasthanera hephayata kare [1]; eta'i tadera jan'ya adhika pabitra. Tara ya kare niscaya allah‌ se bisaye samyaka abahita
24_31: Ara mumina nariderake baluna, tara yena tadera drstike sanyata kare [1] ebam tadera lajjasthanera hephayata kare [2]; ara tara yena tadera saundarya [3] pradarsana na kare tabe ya sadharanata prakasa haye thake [4]. Ara tara tadera gala o buka yena mathara kapara dbara dheke rakhe [5]. Ara tara yena tadera sbami, pita, sbasura, putra, sbamira putra, bha'i, bha'iyera chele, bonera chele, apana narira [6], tadera malikanadhina dasi, purusadera madhye yauna kamana- rahita purusa [7] ebam naridera gopana anga sambandhe ajna balaka [8] chara karo kache tadera saundarya prakasa na kare, tara yena tadera gopana saundarya prakasera uddesye sajore padacarana na kare [9]. He muminagana! Tomara saba'i allah‌ra dike phire asa [10], yate tomara saphalakama hate para.’
24_32: Ara tomadera madhye yara bibahahina’ [1] tadera biye sampadana kara ebam tomadera dasa o dasidera madhye yara sat tadera'o [2]. Tara abhabagrasta hale allah‌ nija anugrahe taderake abhabamukta kare debena; allah‌ to pracuryamaya, sarbajna
24_33: Ara yadera biyera samarthya ne'i, allah‌ taderake nija anugrahe abhabamukta na kara paryanta tara yena sanyama abalambana kare [1] ebam tomadera malikanadhina dasa-dasidera madhye ke'u tara muktira jan'ya likhita cukti ca'ile, tadera sathe cuktite abad'dha ha'o, yadi tomara tadera madhye kalyana ache bale janate para. Ara allah‌ tomaderake ye sampada diyechena ta theke tomara taderake dana kara. Ara tomadera dasira lajjasthanera pabitrata raksa karate ca'ile duniyara jibanera dhana-lalasaya taderake byabhicare badhya karo na. Ara yara taderake badhya karabe, niscaya taderake badhya karara para allah‌ to ksamasila, parama dayalu
24_34: Ara abasya'i amara tomadera kache nayila karechi suspasta ayatasamuha, tomadera purbabartidera theke drstanta o muttakidera jan'ya upadesa
24_35: Allah‌ asamanasamuha o yaminera nura [1], tamra [2] nurera upama yena ekati dipadhara yara madhye ache eka pradipa, pradipati ekati kamcera abaranera madhye sthapita, kamcera abaranati ujjbala naksatrera mata, ta jbalano haya barakatamaya yayatuna gachera taila dbara [3] ya sudhu purba dikera (suryera alokaprapta) naya abara sudhu pascima dikera (suryera alokaprapta'o) naya, aguna take sparsa na karale'o yena tara taila ujjbala alo dicche; nurera upara nura! Allah‌ yake icche hedayeta karena tamra nurera dike. Allah‌ manusera jan'ya upamasamuha barnana kare thakena ebam allah‌ saba kichu samparke sarbajna
24_36: Se saba ghare [1] yake samunnata karate [2] ebam yate tamra nama smarana karate allah‌ nirdesa diyechena [3], sakala o sandhyaya tamra pabitrata o mahima ghosana kare
24_37: sesaba loka [1], yaderake byabasa-banijya o kraya-bikraya konoti'i allah‌ra smarana hate ebam salata kayema o yakata pradana hate birata rakhe na, tara bhaya kare se dinake yedina aneka antara o drstisamuha ulte yabe
24_38: Yate tara ye uttama kaja kare tara jan'ya allah‌ taderake puraskara dena [1] ebam tini nija anugrahe tadera prapyera besi dena. Ara allah‌ yake icche aparimita jibika dana karena
24_39: Ara yara kuphari kare [1] tadera amalasamuha marubhumira maricikara mata, pipasa katara byakti yake pani mane kare thake, kintu yakhana se setara kache ase takhana dekhe seta kichu'i naya ebam se pabe sekhane [2] allah‌ke, atahpara tini take tara hisaba purnamatraya debena. Ara allah‌ druta hiseba grahanakari
24_40: Athaba tadera kaja gabhira sagarera talera andhakarera mata, yake acchanna kare tarangera upara taranga, yara urdhbe meghapunja, andhakarapunja starera upara stara, emanaki se hata bera karale ta adau dekhate pabe na. Ara allah‌ yara jan'ya nura rakhenani tara jan'ya kono nura'i ne'i
24_41: Apani ki dekhena na ye, asamanasamuha o yamine yara ache tara ebam saribad'dhabhabe uddiyamana pakhira allah‌ra pabitrata o mahima ghosana kare? Pratyeke'i jane tara ‘ibadatera o pabitrata-mahima ghosanara pad'dhati. Ara tara ya kare se bisaya allah‌ samyaka abagata
24_42: Ara asamanasamuha o yaminera sarbabhaumatba allah‌ra'i ebam allah‌ra'i dike phire ya'oya
24_43: Apani ki dekhena na, allah‌ sancalita karena meghamalake, tarapara tini ta ekatra karena ebam pare punjibhuta karena, atahpara apani dekhate pana tara madhya theke nirgata haya baridhara; ara tini akase abasthita meghera paharera madhyasthita silastupa theke barsana karena sila atahpara eta dbara tini yake icche aghata karena ebam yake icche tara upara theke etake an'ya dike phiriye dena. Meghera bidyut jhalaka yena drstisakti praya kere neya
24_44: Ara allah‌ rata o dinera abartana ghatana [1], niscaya ete siksa rayeche antardrstisampannadera jan'ya
24_45: Ara allah‌ samasta jiba srsti karechena pani theke [1], atahpara tadera kichu sankhyaka pete bhara diye cale, kichu sankhyaka du‘paye cale ebam kichu sankhyaka cale cara paye. Allah‌ ya icche srsti karena, niscaya allah‌ saba kichura upara ksamatabana
24_46: Abasya'i amara suspasta ayatasamuha nayila karechi, ara allah‌ yake icche sarala sathika pathe paricalita karena
24_47: Ara tara bale, ‘amara allah‌ o rasulera prati imana analama ebam amara anugatya karechi.’ Era para tadera ekadala mukha phiriye neya; asale tara mumina naya
24_48: Ara yakhana taderake daka haya allah‌ o tamra rasulera dike, tadera madhye bicara-phayasala kare deyara jan'ya, takhana tadera ekadala mukha phiriye neya
24_49: Ara yadi hakka tadera sapakse haya, tahale tara binitabhabe rasulera kache chute ase
24_50: Tadera antare ki roga ache, na tara sansaya posana kare? Na tara bhaya kare ye, allah‌ o tamra rasula tadera prati yuluma karabena? Baram tara'i to yalima
24_51: Muminadera ukti to e'i---yakhana tadera madhye bicara-phayasala kare deyara jan'ya allah‌ ebam tamra rasulera dike daka haya, takhana tara bale, ‘amara sunalama ebam anugatya karalama.’ Ara tara'i saphalakama
24_52: Ara ye ke'u allah‌ o tamra rasulera anugatya kare, allah‌ke bhaya kare o tamra taka'oya abalambana kare, tahale tara'i krtakarya
24_53: Ara tara drrhabhabe allah‌ra sapatha kare bale ye, apani taderake adesa karale tara abasya'i bera habe; apani baluna, ‘sapatha karo na, anugatyera byaparati jana'i ache. Tomara ya kara niscaya allah‌ se bisaye sabisesa abahita.’
24_54: Baluna, ‘tomara allah‌ra anugatya kara ebam rasulera anugatya kara.’ Tarapara yadi tomara mukha phiriye na'o, tabe tara upara arpita dayitbera jan'ya tini'i dayi ebam tomadera upara arpita dayitbera jan'ya tomara'i dayi; ara tomara tara anugatya karale satpatha pabe, mulatah rasulera dayitba sudhu spastabhabe paumche deya
24_55: Tomadera madhye yara imana ane o satkaja kare allah‌ taderake pratisruti dicchena ye, tini abasya'i taderake yamine pratinidhitba dana karabena, yemana tini pratinidhitba dana karechena tadera purbabartiderake ebam tini abasya'i tadera jan'ya pratisthita karabena tadera dinake ya tini tadera jan'ya pachanda karechena ebam tadera bhayabhitira pare taderake nirapatta dana karabena. Tara amara ‘ibadata karabe, amara sathe kono kichuke sarika karabe na [1], ara erapara yara kuphari karabe tara'i phasika
24_56: Ara tomara salata kayema kara, yakata da'o o rasulera anugatya kara, yate tomadera upara rahamata kara yaya
24_57: Yara kuphari kareche tadera byapare apani kakhano eta mane karabena na ye, tara yamine aparagakari [1]. Tadera asrayasthala hacche aguna; ara kata nikrsta e pratyabartanasthala
24_58: he muminagana! Tomadera malikanadhina dasa-dasira ebam tomadera madhye yara bayahprapta hayani tara yena tomadera kakse prabesa karate tina samaya anumati grahana kare, phajarera salatera age, dupure yakhana tomara tomadera posaka khule rakha takhana ebam ‘isara salatera para; e tina samaya tomadera gopaniyatara samaya. E tina samaya chara (an'ya samaya bina anumatite prabesa karale) tomadera ebam tadera kono dosa ne'i [1]. Tomadera ekake an'yera kache to yete'i haya. Ebhabe allah‌ tomadera jan'ya tamra ayatasamuha bibrta karena. Ara allah‌ sarbajna, prajnamaya
24_59: Ara tomadera santana-santati bayahprapta hale tara'o yena anumati prarthana kare yemana anumati prarthana kare thake tadera barara. Ebhabe allah‌ tomadera jan'ya tamra ayatasamuha bibrta karena. Ara allah‌ sarbajna, prajnamaya
24_60: Ara brd'dha narira, yara biyera asa rakhe na, tadera jan'ya aparadha ne'i, yadi tara tadera saundarya pradarsana na kare tadera bahirbasa khule rakhe. Ara e theke tadera birata thaka'i tadera jan'ya uttama [1]. Ara allah‌i sarbasrota, sarbajna
24_61: Andhera jan'ya dosa ne'i, khanjera jan'ya dosa ne'i, rugnera jan'ya dosa ne'i ebam tomadera nijedera jan'ya'o dosa ne'i kha'oya-da'oya kara tomadera ghare athaba tomadera pitadera ghare, matadera ghare, bha'idera ghare, bonadera ghare, caca-jethadera ghare, phuphudera ghare, mamadera ghare, khaladera ghare athaba sesaba ghare yegulora cabira malika tomara athaba tomadera bandhudera ghare. Tomara ekatre kha'o ba prthaka prthakabhabe kha'o tate tomadera jan'ya kono aparadha ne'i. Tabe yakhana tomara kono ghare prabesa karabe takhana tomara parasparera prati salama karabe abhibadanasbarupa ya allah‌ra kacha theke kalyanamaya o pabitra. Ebhabe allah‌ tomadera jan'ya tamra ayatasamuha spastabhabe bibrta karena yate tomara anudhabana karate para
24_62: Mumina to tara'i yara allah‌ o tamra rasulera upara imana ane ebam rasulera sange samastigata byapare ekatra hale tara anumati chara sare pare na; niscaya yara apanara anumati prarthana kare tara'i allah‌ ebam tamra rasulera upara imana rakhe. Ata'eba, tara tadera kono kajera jan'ya apanara anumati ca'ile tadera madhye yaderake icche apani anumati debena ebam tadera jan'ya allah‌ra kache ksama prarthana karabena. Niscaya allah‌ parama ksamasila, parama dayalu
24_63: Tomara rasulera ahbanake tomadera eke aparera ahbanera mata ganya kara na; tomadera madhye yara eke aparake arala kare alaksye sare pare allah‌ to taderake janena [1]. Kaje'i yara tamra adesera birud'dhacarana kare tara satarka hoka ye, biparyaya tadera upara apatita habe athaba apatita habe tadera upara yantranadayaka sasti
24_64: Jene rakha, asamanasamuha o yamine ya kichu ache ta allah‌ra'i; tomara yate byaprta tini ta abasya'i janena. Ara yedina taderake tamra kache phiriye neya habe, sedina tini taderake janiye debena tara ya karata. Ara allah‌ sabakichu samparke sarbajna
25_1: Kata barakatamaya tini [1]! Yini tamra bandara upara phurakana nayila karechena, srstijagatera jan'ya [2] satarkakari ha'oyara jan'ya
25_2: Yini asamanasamuha o yaminera sarbabhaumatbera adhikari; tini kono santana grahana karenani; sarbabhaumatbe tamra kono sarika ne'i. Tini sabakichu srsti karechena atahpara ta nirdharana karechena yathayatha anupate
25_3: Ara tara tamra paribarte ilaharupe grahana kareche an'yaderake yara kichu'i srsti kare na, baram tara nijera'i srsta ebam ebam tara nijedera apakara kimba upakara karara ksamata rakhe na. Ara mrtyu, jibana o ut'thanera upara'o kono ksamata rakhe na
25_4: Ara kapherara bale, ‘eta mithya chara kichu'i naya, se eta ratana kareche ebam bhinna sampradayera loka take e byapare sahayya kareche.’ Sutaram abasya'i kapherara yuluma o mithya niye eseche
25_5: Tara ara'o bale, ‘egulo to se kalera upakatha, ya se likhiye niyeche; tarapara egulo sakala-sandhya tara kache patha kara haya.’
25_6: Baluna, ‘eta tini'i nayila karechena yini asamanasamuha o yaminera samudaya rahasya janena; niscaya tini parama ksamasila, parama dayalu.’
25_7: Ara'o tara bale, ‘e kemana rasula’ ye kha'oya-da'oya kare ebam hate-bajare calaphera kare; tara kache kono phirisata kena nayila kara hala na, ye tara sange thakata satarkakarirupe?’
25_8: ‘Athaba tara kache kono dhanabhandara ese parala na kena athaba tara ekati bagana ne'i kena ya theke se kheto?’ Ara yalimara aro bale, ‘tomara to eka jadugrasta byaktira'i anusarana karacha.’
25_9: Dekhuna, tara apanara ki upama deya! Phale tara pathabhrasta hayeche, sutaram tara patha pete pare na
25_10: Kata barakatamaya tini yini icche karale apanake dite parena era ceye utkrsta bastu---udyanasamuha yara padadese nadi-nala prabahita ebam tini dite parena apanake prasadasamuha
25_11: baram tara kiyamatera upara [1] mithyaropa kareche. Ara ye kiyamate mithyaropa kare tara jan'ya amara prastuta rekhechi jbalanta aguna
25_12: Dura theke aguna yakhana taderake dekhabe takhana tara sunate pabe era krud'dha garjana o hunkara
25_13: Ara yakhana taderake galaya hata pemciye srnkhalita abasthaya setara kono sankirna sthane niksepa kara habe, takhana tara sekhane dhbansa kamana karabe
25_14: Bala habe, aja tomara eka dhbansake deko na, baram bahu dhbansake daka.’
25_15: Baluna, ‘eta'i sreya, na sthayi jannata, yara pratisruti deya hayeche muttakiderake?’ Ta habe tadera pratidana o pratyabartanasthala
25_16: Sekhane tara cirakala basabasarata abasthaya ya ca'ibe tadera jan'ya ta-i thakabe; e pratisruti purana apanara raba-era'i dayitba
25_17: Ara sedina tini ekatra karabena taderake ebam tara allah‌ra paribarte yadera ‘ibadata karata taderake, tarapara tini jijnesa karabena, ‘tomara'i ki amara e bandaderake bibhranta karechile, na tara nijera'i bibhraanta hayechila?’
25_18: Tara balabe, ‘pabitra o mahana apani! Apanara paribarte amara an'yake abibhabakarupe grahana karate pari na [1]; apani'i to taderake ebam tadera pitrpurusaderake bhoga-sambhara diyechilena; pariname tara yikara tatha smarana bhule giyechila ebam parinata hayechila eka dhbansaprapta sampradaye
25_19: (Allah‌ musarikaderake balabena) ‘tomara ya balate tara to ta mithya sabyasta kareche. Kaje'i tomara sasti pratirodha karate parabe na ebam sahayya'o pabe na. Ara tomadera madhye ye yulama tatha sirka karabe amara take mahasasti asbadana karaba [1].’
25_20: Ara apanara age amara ye sakala rasula pathiyechi tara sakale'i to kha'oya-da'oya karata o hate-bajare calaphera karata [1] ebam (he manusa!) Amara tomadera eka-ke an'yera jan'ya pariksasbarupa karechi. Tomara dhairya dharana karabe ki? Ara apanara raba to sarbadrasta
25_21: Ara yara amadera saksatera asa kare na tara bale, ‘amadera kache phirisata nayila kara haya na kena? Athaba amara amadera rabake dekhi na kena?’ Tara to tadera antare ahankara posana kare [1] ebam tara gurutara abadhyataya mete utheche
25_22: Yedina tara phirisataderake dekhate pabe sedina aparadhidera jan'ya kono susambada thakabe na ebam tara balabe, ‘raksa kara, raksa kara[1].’
25_23: Ara amara tadera krtakarmera prati agrasara haye seguloke biksipta dhulikanaya parinata karaba
25_24: Sedina jannatabasidera basasthana habe utkrsta ebam bisramasthala habe manorama
25_25: Ara sedina akasa bidirna habe meghapunja dbara [1] ebam dale dale phirisataderake namiye deya habe
25_26: se dina curanta kartrtba habe dayamayera [1] ebam kapheradera jan'ya se dina habe atyanta kathina
25_27: Yalima [1] byakti sedina nijera du‘hata dansana karate karate balabe, ‘haya, ami yadi rasulera sathe kono patha abalambana karatama
25_28: ‘Haya, durbhoga amara, ami yadi amukake bandhurupe grahana na karatama
25_29: ‘amake to se bibhranta karechila amara kache upadesa paumchara para.’ Ara sayatana to manusera jan'ya mahaprataraka
25_30: Ara rasula balalena, ‘he amara raba! Amara sampradaya to e kura'anake parityajya sabyasta kareche.’
25_31: Allah�� balena, ‘ara ebhabe'i amara pratyeka nabira jan'ya aparadhidera theke satru baniye thaki. Ara apanara raba'i pathapradarsaka o sahayyakarirupe yathesta.’
25_32: Ara kapherara bale, ‘samagra kura'ana tara kache ekabare nayila halo na kena?’ Ebhabe'i amara nayila karechi apanara hrdayake ta dbara mayabuta karara jan'ya ebam ta krame krame spastabhabe abrtti karechi
25_33: Ara tara apanara kache ye bisaya'i upasthita kare na kena, amara setara sathika samadhana o sundara byakhya apanara kache niye asi
25_34: Yaderake mukhera upara bhara diye cala abasthaya jahannamera dike ekatra kara habe, tara sthanera dika theke ati nikrsta ebam adhika pathabhrasta
25_35: Ara amara to musake kitaba diyechilama ebam tara sathe tara bha'i harunake sahayyakari karechilama
25_36: atahpara amara balechilama, ‘tomara se sampradayera kache ya'o yara amara nidarsanabalite mithyaropa kareche [1].’ Tarapara amara taderake sampurnarupe bidhbasta karechilama
25_37: ara nuhera sampradayake'o, yakhana tara rasulaganera prati mithya aropa karala [1] takhana amara taderake dubiye dilama ebam taderake manusera jan'ya nidarsanasbarupa kare rakhalama. Ara yalimadera jan'ya amara yantranadayaka sasti prastuta kare rekhechi
25_38: Ara amara dhbansa karechilama ‘ada, samuda, ‘ras‌’ [1] -era adhibasike ebam tadera antarbartikalera bahu prajanmake'o
25_39: ara amara tadera pratyekera jan'ya drstanta barnana karechilama ebam tadera sakalake'i amara sampurnarupe dhbansa karechilama
25_40: Ara tara to se janapada diye'i yatayata kare yara upara barsita hayechila akalyanera brsti, tabe ki tara esaba dekhate paya na [1]? Bastuta tara punarut'thanera asa'i kare na
25_41: Ara tara yakhana apanake dekhe, takhana tara apanake sudhu thatta-bidrarupera patrarupe ganya kare, bale, ‘e-i ki se, yake allah‌ rasula kare pathiyechena
25_42: ‘se to amaderake amadera upasyagana hate dure sariye'i dita, yadi na amara tadera anugatyera upara abicala thakatama.’ Ara yakhana tara sasti pratyaksa karabe, takhana janate parabe ke adhika pathabhrasta
25_43: Apani ki take dekhechena, ye tara prabrttike ilaharupe grahana kare? Tabu'o ki apani tara yim'madara habena
25_44: naki apani mane karena ye, tadera adhikansa sone athaba bojhe? Tara to pasura mata'i; baram tara ara'o adhika pathabhrasta
25_45: Apani ki apanara rabera prati laksya karena na [1] kibhabe tini chaya samprasarita karena? Tini icche karale etake to sthira rakhate paratena; tarapara amara suryake karechi era nirdesaka
25_46: Tarapara amara etake amadera dike dhire dhire gutiye ani
25_47: Ara tini'i tomadera jan'ya ratake karechena abaranasbarupa, bisramera jan'ya tomadera diyechena nidraa [1] ebam chariye parara jan'ya karechena dina
25_48: Ara tini'i tamra rahamatera brstira age susambadabahirupe bayu prerana karena ebam amara akasa hate pabitra pani barsana kari
25_49: yate ta dbara amara mrta bhu-khandake sanjibita kari ebam amara ya srsti karechi tara madhya hate bahu jibajantu o manusake ta pana kara'i
25_50: ara amara to ta tadera madhye bitarana kari yate tara smarana kare. Atahpara adhikansa loka sudhu akrtajnata'i prakasa kare
25_51: Ara amara icche karale pratiti janapade ekajana satarkakari pathate paratama
25_52: Kaje'i apani kapheradera anugatya karabena na ebam apani kura'anera sahayye tadera sathe bara jihada caliye yana
25_53: Ara tini'i du'i sagarake samantarale prabahita karechena, ekati mista, supeya ebam an'yati lona, khara; ara tini ubhayera madhye rekhe diyechena eka antaraya, eka anatikramya byabadhana
25_54: Ara tini'i manusake srsti karechena pani hate; tarapara tini take bansagata o baibahika samparkasila karechena [1]. Ara apanara raba halena prabhuta ksamatabana
25_55: Ara tara allah‌ra paribarte emana kichura ‘ibadata kare ya tadera upakara karate pare na ebam tadera apakara'o karate pare na. Ara kaphera to tara rabera birodhitaya sahayogitakari
25_56: Ara amara to apanake sudhu susambadadata o satarkakarirupe'i pathiyechi
25_57: Baluna, ‘ami tomadera kache era jan'ya kono binimaya ca'i na, tabe ye tara rabera dikera patha abalambana karara icche kare.’
25_58: Ara apani nirbhara karuna tamra upara yini ciranjiba, yini marabena na ebam tamra saprasansa pabitrata o mahima ghosana karuna, tini tamra bandadera papa samparke abahita hisebe yathesta
25_59: Tini asamanasamuha, yamina o e du’yera madhyabarti sabakichu chaya dine srsti karena; tarapara tini ‘arasera upara uthalena. Tini'i ‘rahamana’, sutaram tamra sambandhe ye abahita take jijnesa kare dekhuna
25_60: Ara yakhana taderake bala haya, ‘sajadabanata ha'o ‘rahamana’ -era prati,’ takhana tara bale, ‘rahamana abara ki [1]? Tumi ka'uke sajada karate balale'i ki amara take sajada karaba?’ Ara ete tadera palayanaparata'i brd'dhi paya
25_61: Kata barakatamaya tini yini nabhomandale srsti karechena bisala tarakapunja ebam tate sthapana karechena pradipa [1] o alo bikiranakari camda
25_62: Ara tini'i karechena rata o dinake parasparera anugamirupe tara jan'ya--- ye upadesa grahana karate ba krtajna hate caya
25_63: Ara ‘rahamana’ -era banda tara'i, yara yamine atyanta binamrabhabe calaphera kare [1] ebam yakhana jahela byaktira taderake (asalina bhasaya) sambodhana kare, takhana tara bale, ‘salama’
25_64: ebam tara rata atibahita kare tadera rabera uddesye sijadabanata haye o damriye theke
25_65: ebam tara bale, he amadera raba! Apani amadera theke jahannamera sasti hatiye dina, tara sasti to abicchinna
25_66: Niscaya seta basabasa o abasthanasthala hisebe khuba nikrsta
25_67: Ebam yakhana tara byaya kare takhana apabyaya kare na, krpanata'o kare na, ara tadera pantha haya etadubhayera madhyabarti
25_68: Ebam tara allah‌ra sathe kono ilahake dake na [1]. Ara allah‌ yara hatya nisedha karechena, yathartha karana chara take hatya kare na [2]. Ara tara byabhicara kare na [3]; ye egulo kare, se sasti bhoga karabe
25_69: Kiyamatera dina tara sasti bardhitabhabe pradana kara habe ebam sekhane se sthayi habe hina abasthaya
25_70: tabe ye ta'oba kare, imana ane o satkaja kare, phale allah‌ tadera gunahasamuha neka dbara paribartana kare debena. Ara allah‌ ksamasila, parama dayalu
25_71: Ara ye ta'oba kare o satkaja kare, se to sampurnarupe allah‌ra abhimukhi haya
25_72: Ara yara mithyara saksya haya na ebam asara karyakalapera sam'mukhina hale apana maryada raksarthe ta parihara kare cale
25_73: Ebam yara tadera rabera ayatasamuha smarana kariye dile tara upara andha ebam badhirera mata pare thake na
25_74: Ebam yara prarthana kare bale, ‘he amadera raba! Amadera jan'ya emana stri o santana-santati dana karuna yara habe amadera jan'ya cokhajurano. Ara apani amaderake karuna muttakidera jan'ya anusaranayogya
25_75: Tara'i, yaderake pratidana hisebe deya habe jannatera su'ucca kaksa [1] yehetu tara chila dhairyasila. Ara tara prapta habe sekhane abhibadana o salama
25_76: Sekhane tara sthayi habe. Abasthanasthala o basasthana hisebe ta kata utkrsta
25_77: baluna, ‘amara raba tomadera mote'i bhraksepa karena na, yadi na tomara take daka [1]. Atahpara tomara mithyaropa karecha, sutaram acire'i apariharya habe sasti.’
26_3: Tara mumina hacche na bale apani hayata manokaste atmaghati haye parabena
26_4: Amara icche karale asamana theke tadera kache eka nidarsana nayila karatama, phale setara prati tadera ghara binata haye parata
26_5: Ara yakhana'i tadera kache dayamayera kacha theke kono natuna upadesa ase, takhana'i tara ta theke mukha phiriye neya
26_6: Ata'eba, tara to mithyaropa kareche. Kaje'i tara ya niye thatta-bidrupa karata tara prakrta barta tadera kache sighra'i ese parabe
26_7: Tara ki yaminera dike laksya kare na? Amara tate pratyeka prakarera aneka utkrsta udbhida udgata karechi
26_8: niscaya ete ache nidarsana, ara tadera adhikansa'i mumina naya
26_9: Ara niscaya apanara raba, tini to parakramasali, parama dayalu
26_10: Ara smarana karuna, yakhana apanara raba musake deke balalena, ‘apani yalima sampapradayera kache yana
26_11: ‘phira‘a'unera sampapradayera kache; tara ki taka'oya abalambana karabe na?’
26_12: Musa balechilena, ‘he amara raba! Ami asanka karachi ye, tara amara upara mithyaropa karabe
26_13: ‘ebam amara baksa sankucita haye parache, ara amara jihba to sabalila ne'i. Kaje'i harunera prati'o ohi pathana
26_14: ‘Ara amara birud'dhe to tadera eka abhiyoga ache, sutaram ami asanka karachi ye, tara amake hatya karabe.’
26_15: Allah‌ balalena, ‘na, kakhana'i naya, ata'eba apanara ubhaye amadera nidarsanasaha yana, amara to apanadera sathe'i achi, srabanakari
26_16: ‘Ata'eba, apanara ubhaye phira‘a'unera kache yana ebam baluna, ‘amara to srstikulera rabera rasula
26_17: yate tumi amadera sathe yete da'o bani isara'ilake [1].’
26_18: Phira‘a'una balala, ‘amara ki tomake saisabe amadera madhye lalana-palana karini? Ara tumi to tomara jibanera bahu bachara amadera madhye katiyecha
26_19: ‘ebam tumi tomara kaja ya karara ta karecha; tumi to akrtajna.’
26_20: Musa balalena, ‘ami to eta karechilama takhana, yakhana ami chilama bibhraanta’
26_21: ‘Tarapara ami yakhana tomadera bhaye bhita halama takhana ami tomadera kacha theke paliye giyechilama. Erapara amara raba amake prajna (nabu'oyata) diyechena ebam amake rasuladera antarbhukta karechena
26_22: ‘Ara amara prati tomara ye anugrahera katha ullekha kare tumi daya dekhaccha ta to e'i ye, tumi bani isara'ilake dase parinata karecha [1].’
26_24: Musa balalena, ‘tini asamanasamuha o yamina ebam tadera madhyabarti saba kichura raba, yadi tomara niscita bisbasi ha'o.’
26_25: Phira‘a'una tara asepasera lokadera laksa kare balala, ‘tomara ki bhala kare sunacha na?’
26_26: Musa balalena, ‘tini tomadera raba ebam tomadera purbapurusadera'o raba.’
26_27: Phira‘a'una balala, ‘tomadera prati prerita tomadera rasula to abasya'i pagala.’
26_28: Musa balalena, ‘tini purba o pascimera ebam tadera madhyabarti saba kichura raba; yadi tomara bujhe thako!’
26_29: Phira‘a'una balala, ‘tumi yadi amara paribarte an'yake ilaharupe grahana kara ami tomake abasya'i kararud'dha karaba.’
26_30: Musa balalena, ‘ami yadi tomara kache kono spasta bisaya niye asi, tabu'o [1]?’
26_31: Phira‘a'una balala, ‘tumi yadi satyabadi ha'o tabe ta upasthita kara.’
26_32: Tarapara musa tamra lathi niksepa karale tatksanat ta eka spasta ajagare [1] parinata hala
26_33: Ara musa tara hata bera karale tatksanat ta darsakadera drstite subhra ujjbala pratibhata hala
26_34: Phira‘a'una tara asepasera parisadabargake balala, ‘e to eka sudaksa jadukara
26_35: ‘se tomaderake tomadera desa theke tara jadubale bahiskrta karate caya. Ekhana tomara ki karate bala?’
26_36: Tara balala, ‘take o tara bha'ike kichu abakasa da'o ebam nagare nagare sangrahakaderake patha'o
26_37: ‘yena tara tomara kache pratiti abhijna jadukarake upasthita kare.’
26_38: Atahpara eka nirdharita dine nirdista samaye jadukaraderake ekatra kara hala
26_39: ebam lokaderake bala hala, ‘tomara'o samabeta hacche ki
26_40: ‘yena amara jadukaradera anusarana karate pari, yadi tara bijayi haya.’
26_41: Atahpara jadukarera ese phira‘a'unake balala, ‘amara yadi bijayi ha'i amadera jan'ya puraskara thakabe to?’
26_42: Phira‘a'una balala, ‘hyam, takhana to tomara abasya'i amara ghanisthadera samila habe.’
26_43: Musa taderake balalena, ‘tomara ya niksepa karara ta niksepa kara.’
26_44: Atahpara tara tadera rasi o lathi niksepa karala ebam tara balala, ‘phira‘a'unera iyayatera sapatha! Amara'i to bijayi haba.’
26_45: Atahpara musa tara lathi niksepa karalena, sahasa seta tadera alika kirtiguloke graasa karate lagala
26_47: Tara balala, ‘amara imana analama srstikulera rabera prati
26_49: Phira‘a'una balala, ‘ki! Ami tomaderake anumati deyara age'i tomara tara prati bisbasa karale? Se-i to tomadera pradhana ye tomaderake jadu siksa diyeche. Sutaram sighra'i tomara era parinama janabe. Ami abasya'i tomadera hata ebam tomadera pa biparita dika theke kete phelaba ebam tomadera saba'ike sulabid'dha karaba'i.’
26_50: Tara balala, ‘kono ksati ne'i [1], amara to amadera rabera kache'i pratyabartanakari
26_51: Amara asa kari ye, amadera raba amadera aparadha ksama karabena, karana amara muminadera madhye agrani.’
26_52: Ara amara musara prati ohi karechilama e marme ye, ‘amara bandaderake niye rate bera ha'una [1], abasya'i tomadera pascad'dhabana kara habe.’
26_53: Tarapara phira‘a'una sahare sahare loka sangrahakari pathala
26_54: e bale, ‘era to ksudra ekati dala
26_55: ara tara to amadera kraodha udreka kareche
26_56: Ara amara to saba'i sada satarka.’
26_57: Pariname amara phira‘a'una gosthike bahiskrta karalama tadera udyanaraji o prasrabana hate
26_58: ebam dhana-bhandara o suramya saudhamala hate
26_59: Erupa'i ghatechila ebam amara bani isara'ilake karechilama esabera adhikari
26_60: Atahpara tara suryodayakale tadera pichane ese parala
26_61: Atahpara yakhana du‘dala parasparake dekhala, takhana musara sangira balala, ‘amara to dhara pare gelama!’
26_62: Musa balalena, ‘kakhana'i naya! Amara sange achena amara raba [1]; satbara tini amake pathanirdesa karabena.’
26_63: Atahpara amara musara prati ohi karalama ye, apanara lathi dbara sagare aghata karuna. Phale ta bibhakta pratyeka bhaga bisala parbatera mata haye gela
26_64: ara amara sekhane kache niye elama an'ya dalatike
26_65: ebam amara ud'dhara karalama musa o tara sangi sakalake
26_67: Ete to abasya'i nidarsana rayeche, kintu tadera adhikansa'i mumina naya
26_68: Ara apanara raba, tini to parakramasali, parama dayalu
26_69: Ara apani tadera kache ibarahimera brttanta barnana karuna
26_70: Yakhana tini tara pita o tara sampradayake balechilena, ‘tomara kisera ibadata kara?’
26_71: Tara balala, ‘amara murtira puja kari sutaram amara nisthara sathe seguloke amkare thakaba.’
26_72: Tini balalena, ‘tomara yakhana ahbana kara takhana tara tomadera ahbana sone ki?’
26_73: ‘Athaba tara ki tomadera upakara kimba apakara karate pare?’
26_74: Tara balala, ‘na, tabe amara amadera pitrpurusaderake peyechi, tara erupa'i karata.’
26_75: Ibarahima balalena, ‘tomara ki bhabe dekhecha, yadera ‘ibadata tomara kare thaka
26_77: srstikulera raba byatita era saba'i to amara satrau
26_78: ‘Yini amake srsti karechena, atahpara tini'i amake hedayata diyechena
26_79: Ara ‘tini'i amake kha'oyana o pana karana
26_80: ‘Ebam rogakranta hale tini'i amake arogya dana karena
26_81: ‘Ara tini'i amara mrtyu ghatabena, tarapara amake punarjibita karabena
26_82: ‘Ebam yara kache asa kari ye, tini kiyamatera dina amara aparadha ksama kare debena
26_83: ‘He amara raba! Amake prajna dana karuna ebam satkarmasiladera sathe miliye dina
26_85: ‘ebam amake sukhamaya jannatera adhikaridera antarbhukta karuna
26_86: ‘ara amara pitake ksama karuna, tini to pathabhrastadera samila chilena
26_87: ‘Ebam amake lanchita karabena na punarut'thanera dine
26_88: ‘ye dina dhana-sampada o santana-santati kono kaje asabe na
26_89: ‘se dina upakrta habe sudhu se, ye allah‌ra kache asabe bisud'dha antahkarana niye.’
26_90: Ara muttakidera nikatabarti kara habe jannata
26_91: ebam pathabhrastadera jan'ya unmocita kara habe jahannama
26_92: taderake bala habe, ‘tara kothaya, tomara yadera ‘ibadata karate
26_93: ‘allah‌ra paribarte? Tara ki tomadera sahayya karate pare athaba tara ki atmaraksa karate saksama?’
26_94: Atahpara taderake ebam patha bhrastakariderake jahanname niksepa kara habe adhomukhi kare
26_96: Tara sekhane bitarke lipta haye balabe
26_97: ‘allah‌ra sapatha! Amara to spasta pathabhrastataya nimajjita chilama,’
26_98: ‘yakhana amara tomaderake srstikulera rabera samakaksa ganya karatama
26_102: ‘Haya, yadi amadera ekabara phire ya'oyara suyoga ghatata, tahale amara muminadera antarbhukta haye yetama [1]!’
26_103: Ete to abasya'i nidarsana rayeche, kintu tadera adhikansa'i mumina naya
26_104: Ara apanara raba, tini to parakramasali, parama dayalu
26_105: Nuhera sampradaya rasulaganera prati mithya aropa karechila
26_106: Yakhana tadera bha'i nuha taderake balechilena, ‘tomara ki taka'oya abalambana karabe na
26_107: ‘Ami to tomadera jan'ya eka bisbasta rasula
26_108: ‘Ata'eba, tomara allah‌ra taka'oya abalambana kara ebam amara anugatya kara
26_109: ‘Ara ami tomadera kache era jan'ya kono pratidana ca'i na; amara puraskara to srstikulera rabera kache'i ache
26_110: ‘Kaje'i tomara allah‌ra taka'oya abalambana kara ebam amara anugatya kara.’
26_111: Tara balala, ‘amara ki tomara prati bisbasa sthapana karaba athaca itarajanera tomara anusarana karache?’
26_112: Nuha balalena, ‘tara ki karata ta amara janara ki darakara?’
26_113: ‘Tadera hiseba grahana to amara rabera'i kaja; yadi tomara bujhate
26_114: ara ami to ‘muminaderake tariye deyara na'i
26_116: Tara balala, ‘he nuha! Tumi yadi nibrtta na ha'o tabe tumi abasya'i patharera aghate nihatadera madhye samila habe.’
26_117: Nuha balalena, ‘he amara raba! Amara sampradaya to amara upara mithyaropa kareche
26_118: Kaje'i apani amara o tadera madhye spasta mimansa kare dina ebam amake o amara sathe yesaba mumina ache, taderake raksa karuna [1].’
26_119: Atahpara amara take o tara sange yara chila, taderake raksa karalama bojha'i nauyane
26_120: Erapara amara baki saba'ike dubiye dilama
26_121: Ete to abasya'i nidarsana rayeche, kintu tadera adhikansa'i imanadara naya
26_122: Ara apanara raba, tini to parakramasali, parama dayalu
26_124: Yakhana tadera bha'i huda taderake balalena, ‘tomara ki taka'oya abalambana karabe na
26_125: ‘ami to tomadera jan'ya eka bisbasta rasula
26_126: ‘Ata'eba, tomara allah‌ra taka'oya abalambana kara ebam amara anugatya kara
26_127: ‘Ara ami tomadera kache era jan'ya kono pratidana ca'i na, amara puraskara to srstikulera rabera kache'i
26_128: ‘Tomara ki pratiti ucca sthane [1] stambha nirmana karacha nirarthaka
26_129: ‘ara tomara prasadasamuha [1] nirmana karacha yena tomara sthayi habe
26_130: Ara yakhana tomara aghata hana takhana aghata hene thaka sbecchacari haye
26_131: Sutaram tomara allah‌ra taka'oya abalambana kara ebam amara anugatya kara
26_132: Ara tomara tamra taka'oya abalambana kara yini tomaderake dana karechena se samudaya, ya tomara jana
26_133: Tini tomaderake dana karechena catuspada jantu o putra santana
26_135: ‘ami to tomadera jan'ya asanka kari mahadinera sastira.’
26_136: Tara balala, ‘tumi upadesa da'o ba na-i da'o, ubhaya'i amadera jan'ya samana
26_139: Sutaram tara tara prati mithyaropa karala phale amara taderake dhbansa karalama. Ete to abasya'i ache nidarsana; kintu tadera adhikansa'i mumina naya
26_140: Ara apanara raba, tini to parakramasali, parama dayalu
26_141: Samuda sampradaya rasulaganera prati mithyaropa karechila
26_142: Yakhana tadera bha'i saliha taderake balalena, ‘tomara ki taka'oya abalambana karabe na
26_143: ‘ami to tomadera jan'ya eka bisbasta rasula
26_144: Sutaram tomara allah‌ra taka'oya abalambana kara ebam amara anugatya kara
26_145: ‘ara ami tomadera kache era jan'ya kono pratidana ca'i na, amara pratidana to srstikulera rabera kache'i ache
26_146: ‘Tomaderake ki nirapada abasthaya chere rakha habe, ya ekhane ache tate
26_148: ‘o sasyaksetre ebam sukomala guccha bisista khejura bagane
26_149: ‘ara tomara naipunyera sathe pahara kete ghara nirmana karacha
26_150: Sutaram tomara allah‌ra taka'oya abalambana kara ebam amara anugatya kara
26_151: ara tomara simalanghanakaridera nirdesera anugatya karo na
26_152: ‘yara yamine biparyaya srsti kare ebam sansodhana kare na.’
26_154: ‘Tumi to amadera mata'i ekajana manusa, kaje'i tumi yadi satyabadi ha'o tabe ekati nidarsana upasthita kara.’
26_155: Saliha balalena, ‘eta ekata ustrai, era jan'ya ache pani panera pala ebam tomadera jan'ya ache nirdharita dine pani panera pala
26_156: ‘ara tomara era kono anista sadhana karo na; karale mahadinera sasti tomadera upara apatita habe.’
26_157: Atahpara tara setake hatya karala, pariname tara anutapta hala
26_158: Atahpara sasti taderake graasa karala. Ete abasya'i rayeche nidarsana, kintu tadera adhikansa'i mumina naya
26_159: Ara apanara raba, tini to parakramasali, parama dayalu
26_160: Lutera sampradaya rasulaganera prati mithyaropa karechila
26_161: yakhana tadera bha'i luta taderake balalena, ‘tomara ki taka'oya abalambana karabe na
26_162: ‘ami to tomadera jan'ya eka bisbasta rasula
26_163: ‘Kaje'i tomara allah‌ra taka'oya abalambana kara ebam amara anugatya kara
26_164: ‘Ara ami era jan'ya tomadera kache kono pratidana ca'i na, amara pratidana to srstikulera rabera kache'i ache
26_165: ‘Srstikulera madhye to tomara'i ki purusera sathe upagata ha'o
26_166: ‘ara tomadera raba tomadera jan'ya ye striganake srsti karechena taderake tomara barjana kare thaka. Baram tomara to eka simalanghanakari sampradaya.’
26_167: Tara balala, ‘he luta! Tumi yadi nibrtta na ha'o, tabe abasya'i tumi nirbasita habe.’
26_168: Luta balalena, ‘ami abasya'i tomadera e kajera ghrnakari
26_169: ‘He amara raba! Amake ebam amara paribara-parijanake, tara ya kare ta theke raksa karuna.’
26_170: Tarapara amara take ebam tara paribara-parijanake sakalake raksa karalama
26_171: Eka brd'dha chara [1], ye chila pichane abasthanakaridera antarbhukta
26_172: Tarapara amara apara sakalake dhbansa karalama
26_173: Ara amara tadera upara sasti mulaka brsti barsana karechilama, bhiti pradarsitadera jan'ya e brsti chila kata nikrsta
26_174: ete to abasya'i nidarsana rayeche, kintu tadera adhikansa'i mumina naya
26_175: Ara apanara raba, tini to parakramasali, parama dayalu
26_177: Yakhana su‘a'iba taderake balechilena, ‘tomara ki taka'oya abalambana karabe na
26_178: ami to tomadera jan'ya eka bisbasta rasula
26_179: ‘Kaje'i tomara allah‌ra taka'oya abalambana kara ebam amara anugatya kara
26_180: ‘Ara ami tomadera kache era jan'ya kono pratidana ca'i na. Amara puraskara to srstikulera rabera kache'i ache
26_181: ‘Mape purna matraya debe; ara yara mape kama deya tomara tadera antarbhukta hayo na
26_183: ‘Ara lokaderake tadera prapya bastu kama di'o na ebam prthibite biparyaya srsti kare beri'o na
26_184: Ara tamra taka'oya abalambana kara yini tomaderake o tomadera age yara gata hayeche taderake srsti karechena.’
26_186: ‘ara tumi to amadera mata'i ekajana manusa, amara to tomake mithyabadidera antarbhukta mane kari
26_187: ‘Sutaram tumi yadi satyabadi ha'o tabe akasera eka khanda amadera upara phele da'o.’
26_188: Tini balalena, ‘amara raba bhala kare janena tomara ya kara.’
26_189: Sutaram tara tara prati mithyaropa karala, phale taderake meghacchanna dinera sasti grasa karala [1]. E to chila eka bhisana dinera sasti
26_190: ete to abasya'i rayeche nidarsana [1], ara tadera adhikansa'i mumina naya
26_191: Ara apanara raba, tini to parakramasali, parama dayalu
26_192: Ara niscaya eta (ala-kura'ana) srstikulera raba hate nayilakrta
26_193: Bisbasta ruha (jibara'ila) ta niye nayila hayechena
26_194: Apanara hrdaye, yate apani satarkakaridera antarbhukta hate parena
26_196: Ara purbabarti kitabasamuhe abasya'i era ullekha ache
26_197: Bani isara'ilera alemagana e samparke jane---eta ki tadera jan'ya nidarsana naya
26_198: ara amara yadi eta kono anarabera upara nayila karatama
26_199: ebam eta se tadera kache patha karata, tabe tara tate imana anata na
26_200: ebhabe amara seta aparadhidera antare sancara karechi
26_201: Tara ete imana anabe na yataksana na tara yantranadayaka sasti dekhate pabe
26_202: sutaram ta tadera kache ese parabe hathat kare; athaca tara kichu'i upalabdhi karate parabe na
26_203: Takhana tara balabe, ‘amaderake ki abakasa deya habe?’
26_204: Tara ki tabe amadera sasti tbaranbita karate caya
26_205: apani bhebe dekhuna, yadi amara taderake dirghakala bhoga-bilasa karate de'i
26_206: tarapara taderake ye bisaye satarka kara hayechila ta tadera kache ese pare
26_207: takhana ya tadera bhoga-bilasera upakarana hisebe deya hayechila ta tadera ki upakare asabe
26_208: ara amara emana kono janapada dhbansa karini yara jan'ya satarkakari chila na
26_209: (tadera jan'ya) smarana hisebe, ara amara yulumakari na'i
26_211: Ara tara e kajera yogya'o naya ebam tara era samarthya'o rakhe na
26_212: Taderake to sonara suyoga hate dure rakha hayeche
26_213: Ata'eba apani an'ya kono ilahake allah‌ra sathe dakabena na, dakale apani sastipraptadera antarbhukta habena
26_214: Ara apanara nikatastha jnati-gosthike satarka karuna
26_215: Ebam yara apanara anusarana kare sesaba muminadera prati apanara paksaputa abanata kare dina
26_216: Atahpara tara yadi apanara abadhya haya tahale apani baluna, ‘tomara ya kara niscaya ami ta theke dayamukta.’
26_217: Ara apani nirbhara karuna parakramasali, parama dayalu allah‌ra upara
26_218: yini apanake dekhena yakhana apani damrana
26_221: Tomaderake ki ami janaba kara kache sayatanara nayila haya
26_222: tara to nayila haya pratyekati ghora mithyabadi o papira kache
26_223: Tara kana pete thake ebam tadera adhikansa'i mithyabadi
26_224: Ara kabigana, tadera anusarana to bibhraantara'i kare
26_225: Apani ki dekhena na ye, ora udabhraanta haye pratyeka upatyakaya ghure beraya
26_226: ebam tara to bale emana katha, ya tara kare na
26_227: Kintu tara chara yara imana eneche, satkaja kareche, allah‌ke besi parimana smarana kareche ebam atyacarita ha'oyara para pratisodha grahana kareche. Ara yalimara sighra'i phire yabe janabe kona dharanera gantabyasthale tara phire yabe
27_1: Tba-sina; egulo ala-kura'ana ebam suspasta kitabera ayata
27_3: Yara salata kayema kare o yakata deya ara tara'i akherate niscita bisbasa rakhe
27_4: Niscaya yara akherate imana ane na, tadera jan'ya tadera kajake amara sobhana karechi [1], phale tara bibhranta haye ghure beraya
27_5: tadera'i jan'ya rayeche nikrsta sasti ebam tara'i akherate sarbadhika ksatigrastha
27_6: Ara niscaya apani ala-kura'ana prapta hacchena prajnamaya, sarbajnera nikata theke
27_7: Smarana karuna, yakhana musa tara paribarera lokaderake balechilena, ‘niscaya ami aguna dekhechi, acire'i ami sekhana theke tomadera jan'ya kono khabara anaba athaba tomadera jan'ya anaba jalanta angara, yate tomara aguna pohate para [1].’
27_8: Atahpara tini yakhana setara kache asalena [1], takhana ghosita hala, ‘barakatamaya, ya ache e alora madhye ebam ya ache era carapase [2], ara srstikulera raba allah‌ pabitra o mahimanbita
27_9: ‘he musa! Niscaya ami allah‌ [1]! Parakramasali, prajnamaya
27_10: ‘ara apani apanara lathi niksepa karuna.’ Tarapara yakhana tini setake sapera mata chutochuti karate dekhalena takhana tini pichanera dike chutate lagalena [1] ebam phire'o takalena na. ‘He musa! Bhita habena na, niscaya ami emana ye, amara sannidhye rasulagana bhaya paya na
27_11: ‘tabe ye yuluma kare, [1] tarapara tarapara manda kajera paribarte satkaja kare, tahale niscaya ami ksamasila, parama dayalu
27_12: ‘Ara apani apanara hata apanara bagale rakhuna, eta bera haye asabe subhra nirdosa abasthaya. Eta phira‘a'una o tara sampradayera kache anita nayati nidarsanera antargata [1]. Tara to chila phaseka sampradaya.’
27_13: Atahpara yakhana tadera kache amadera nidarsanasamuha drsyamana hala, tara balala, ‘eta suspasta jadu.’
27_14: Ara tara an'yaya o ud'dhatabhabe nidarsanagulo pratyakhyana karala, yadi'o tadera antara eguloke niscita satya bale grahana karechila [1]. Sutaram dekhuna, biparyaya srstikaridera parinama kemana hayechila
27_15: ara abasya'i amara da'uda o sula'imanake jnana dana karechilama [1] ebam tara ubhaye balechilena, ‘sakala prasansa allah‌ra yini amaderake tamra bahu mumina bandadera upara sresthatba diyechena [2].’
27_16: Ara sula'imana hayechilena da'udera uttaradhikari [1] ebam tini balechilena, ‘he manusa! Amaderake [2] pakhidera bhasa siksa deya hayeche ebam amaderake sabakichu deya hayeche [3], eta abasya'i suspasta anugraha.’
27_17: Ara sula'imanera samane samabeta kara hala tara bahinike---jina, manusa o bihangakulake ebam taderake bin'yasta kara hala bibhinna byuhe
27_18: Abasese yakhana tara pipara adhyusita upatyakaya paumchala takhana eka pipara balala, ‘he pipara-bahini! Tomara tomadera ghare prabesa kara, yena sula'imana ebam tara bahini tadera ajnatasare tomaderake payera nice pise na phele.’
27_19: Atahpara sula'imana tara e kathate mrdu hasalena ebam balalena, ‘he amara raba! Apani amake samarthya dina [1] yate ami apanara prati krtajnata prakasa karate pari, amara prati o amara pita-matara prati apani ye anugraha karechena tara jan'ya ebam yate ami emana satkaja karate pari ya apani pachanda karena [2]. Ara apanara anugrahe amake apanara satkarmaparayana bandadera samila karuna [3].’
27_20: Ara sula'imana pakhidera sandhana nilena [1] ebam balalena, ‘amara ki halo [2] ye, ami hudahudake dekhachi na! Na ki se anupasthita
27_21: ‘ami abasya'i take kathina sasti deba kimba take yabeha karaba [1] athaba se amara nikata upayukta karana darsabe [2].’
27_22: Kichuksana pare'i hudahuda ese parala ebam balala, ‘apani ya jnane paribestana karate parenani ami ta paribestana karechi [1] ebam ‘saba’ [2] hate suniscita sambada niye esechi
27_23: ‘Ami to eka narike dekhalama tadera upara rajatba karache [1]. Take deya hayeche sakala kichu hate'i [2] ebam tara ache eka birata sinhasana
27_24: ‘Ami take o tara sampradayake dekhalama tara allah‌ra paribarte suryake sajada karache [1]. Ara sayatana [2] tadera karyabali tadera kache susobhita kare diyeche ebam taderake satpatha theke badhagrastha kareche, phale tara hedayeta pacchena
27_25: ‘nibrtta kareche e jan'ye ye, tara yena sajada na kare allah‌ke, yini asamanasamuha o yaminera lukkayita bastuke bera karena [1]. Ara yini janena ya tomara gopana kara ebam ya tomara byakta kara
27_26: ‘Allah‌, tini chara satya kono ilaha ne'i, tini maha‘arasera raba [1].’
27_27: Sula'imana balalena, ‘amara dekhaba tumi ki satya balecha, naki tumi mithyukadera antarbhukta
27_28: ‘tumi ya'o amara e patra niye ebam eta tadera kache niksepa kara; tarapara tadera kacha theke sare theko [1] ebam laksya karo tadera pratikriya ki?’
27_29: Se nari balala, ‘he parisadabarga! Amake eka sam'manita patra [1] deya hayeche
27_30: ‘niscaya eta sula'imanera kacha theke ebam niscaya eta rahamana, rahima allah‌ra name
27_31: ‘yate tomara amara birodhitara aud'dhatya prakasa na karo ebam anugatya sbikara kare amara kache upasthita ha'o [1].’
27_32: Se nari balala, ‘he parisadabarga! Amara e byapare tomadera matamata da'o [1]. Ami kono byapare curanta sid'dhanta grahana kari na tomadera upasthiti chara
27_33: Tara balala, ‘amara to saktisali o kathora yod'dha; tabe sid'dhanta grahanera ksamata apanara'i, ki adesa karabena ta apani bhebe dekhuna.’
27_34: Se nari balala, ‘raja-badasara yakhana kono janapade prabesa kare takhana to setake biparyasta kare deya ebam sekhanakara maryadabana byaktiderake apadasta kare, ara erupa kara'i tadera riti
27_35: ‘ara ami to tadera nikata upadhaukana pathacchi, dekhi, dutera ki niye phire ase [1].’
27_36: Atahpara duta sula'imanera kache asale sula'imana balalena, ‘tomara ki amake dhana-sampada diye sahayya karacha? Allah‌ amake ya diyechena, ta tomaderake ya diyechena tara ceye utkrsta [1] baram tomara'i tomadera upadhaukana niye utphulla bodha kara
27_37: ‘Tadera kache phire ya'o, atahpara amara abasya'i tadera birud'dhe niye asaba eka sain'ya bahini yara mukabila karara sakti tadera ne'i. Ara amara abasya'i taderake sekhana theke bahiskrta karaba lanchitabhabe ebam tara habe apadastha.’
27_38: Sula'imana balalena, ‘he parisadabarga! Tara atmasamarpana kare [1] amara kache asara [2] age tomadera madhye ke tara sinhasana amara kache niye asabe
27_39: eka saktisali jina balala, ‘apani apanara sthana theke uthara age'i ami ta ene deba [1] ebam e byapare ami abasya'i saktimana, bisbasta [2].’
27_40: Kitabera jnana yara chila [1], se balala, ‘apani cokhera palaka phelara age'i ami ta apanake ene deba.’ Atahpara sula'imana yakhana ta samane sthira abasthaya dekhalena takhana tini balalena, ‘e amara rabera anugraha, yate tini amake pariksa karena ye, ami krtajnata prakasa kari, na akrtajnata prakasa kari. Ara ye krtajnata prakasa kare, se to krtajnata prakasa kare nijera'i kalyanera jan'ya, ara ye ke'u akrtajna habe, se jene rakhuka ye, amara raba abhabamukta, mahanubhaba [2].’
27_41: Sula'imana balalena, ‘tomara tara sinhasanera akrti tara kache aparicita kare badale da'o; dekhi se sathika disa paya, na se tadera antarbhukta yadera disa ne'i
27_42: atahpara se nari yakhana asala, takhana take jijnesa kara hala, ‘tomara sinhasana ki erupa'i?’ Se balala, ‘mane haya eta seta'i. Ara amaderake itipurbe'i prakrta jnana dana kara hayeche ebam amara ajnabaha'o haye gechi [1].’
27_43: Ara allah‌ra paribarte se yara puja karata seta'i take nibrtta karechila [1], se to chila kaphera sampradayera antarbhukta
27_44: Take bala hala, ‘prasadatite prabesa kara.’ Atahpara yakhana se seta dekhala takhana se setake eka gabhira jalasaya mane karala ebam se tara payera gocha duto anabrta karala. Sula'imana balalena, eta to sbaccha sphatika mandita prasada. Se'i nari balala, ‘he amara raba! Ami to nijera prati yuluma karechilama [1], ara ami sula'imanera sathe srstikulera raba allah‌ra kache atmasamarpana karachi.’
27_45: Ara abasya'i amara samuda sampradayera kache tadera bha'i salehake pathiyechilama e adesasaha ye, ‘tomara allah‌ra ‘ibadata kara [1],’ ete tara du’dale bibhakta haye bitarke lipta hala
27_46: Tini balalena, ‘he amara sampradaya! Tomara kena kalyanera age akalyana tbaranbita karate caccha [1]? Kena tomara allah‌ra kache ksama prarthana karacha na, yate tomara rahamata pete para?’
27_47: Tara balala, ‘tomake o tomara sange yara ache taderake amara amangalera karana mane kari [1].’ Saleha balalena, ‘tomadera ‘kulaksana grahana kara’ allah‌ra ikh‌tiyare, bastuta tomara emana eka sampradaya yaderake pariksa kara hacche [2].’
27_48: Ara se sahare chila emana naya byakti [1], yara dese biparyaya srsti karata ebam sansodhana karata na
27_49: Tara balala, ‘tomara paraspara allahara name sapatha grahana kara, amara rate'i sesa kare deba take o tara paribara-parijanake; tarapara tara abhibhabakake niscita kare balaba ye, ‘tara paribara-parijana hatya amara pratyaksa karini; ara amara abasya'i satyabadi [1].’
27_50: Ara tara eka cakranta karechila ebam amara'o eka kausala abalambana karalama, athaca tara upalabdhi'o karate pareni
27_51: Ata'eba dekhuna, tadera cakrantera parinama ki hayeche--- amara to taderake o tadera sampradayera sakalake dhbansa karechi
27_52: Sutaram e to tadera gharabari--- yulumera karane ya janasun'ya abasthaya pare ache; niscaya ete nidarsana rayeche, se sampradayera jan'ya yara jane
27_53: Ara amara ud'dhara karechilama taderake, yara imana enechila. Ara tara taka'oya abalambana karata
27_54: Ara smarana karuna lutera katha [1], tini tara sampradayake balechilena, ‘tomara jene-dekhe [2] kena aslila kaja karacha
27_55: ‘tomara ki kamatrptira jan'ya narike chere puruse upagata habe? Tomara to eka ajna [1] sampradaya.’
27_56: Uttare tara sampradaya sudhu balala, ‘luta-paribarake tomara janapada theke bahiskara kara, era to emana loka yara pabitra thakate caya.’
27_57: Atahpara amara take o tara parijanabargake ud'dhara karalama, tara stri chara, amara take abasistadera antarbhukta karechilama
27_58: Ara amara tadera upara bhayankara brsti barsana karechilama; sutaram bhiti pradarsitadera jan'ya e barsana kata'i na nikrsta chila
27_59: Baluna, ‘sakala prasansa allah‌ra'i [1] ebam santi tamra manonita bandadera prati [2]!’ Srestha ki allah‌, naki tara yaderake sarika kare tara
27_60: naki tini [1], yini srsti karechena asamanasamuha o yamina ebam akasa theke tomadera jan'ya barsana karena brsti, tarapara amara ta dbara manorama udyana srsti kari, tara gacha ud‌gata karara ksamata tomadera ne'i. Allah‌ra sathe an'ya kono ilah‌ ache ki? Baram tara emana eka sampradaya yara (allah‌ra) samakaksa nirdharana kare
27_61: Naki tini, yini yaminake karechena basabasera upayogi ebam tara majhe majhe prabahita karechena nadinala ebam tate sthapana karechena sudrrha parbata o du'i sagarera majhe srsti karechena antaraya [1]; allah‌ra sathe an'ya kono ilaha ache ki? Baram tadera adhikansa'i jane na
27_62: Naki tini, yini artera dake [1] sara dena, yakhana se tamke dake ebam bipada duribhuta karena [2], ara tomaderake yaminera pratinidhi banana [3]. Allah‌ra sathe an'ya kono ilaha ache ki? Tomara khuba alpa'i siksa grahana kare thaka
27_63: Naki tini, yini tomaderake sthalabhumi o samudrera andhakare patha dekhana [1] ebam yini tamra anugrahera prakkale susambadabahi batasa prerana karena. Allah‌ra sathe an'ya kono ilaha ache ki? Tara yake sarika kare allah‌ ta theke bahu urdhbe
27_64: Naki tini, yini prathama srsti karena, tarapara setara punarabrtti karabena [1] ebam yini tomaderake asamana o yamina hate jibanopakarana dana karena [2]. Allah‌ra sathe an'ya kono ilaha ache ki? Baluna, ‘tomara yadi satyabadi ha'o tabe tomadera pramana pesa kara [3].’
27_65: Baluna, ‘allah‌ byatita asamana o yamine ke'u'i gayeba jane na [1] ebam tara upalabdhi'o karena kakhana ut'thita habe [2].’
27_66: Baram akherata samparke tadera jnana to nihsesa hayeche [1]; tara to e bisaye sandehe rayeche, baram e bisaye tara andha
27_67: Kapherara bale, ‘amara o amadera pitrpurusera matite parinata haye gele'o ki amaderake bera kara habe
